results.compiled_code:
with all_values as (

    select
        age_group as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_patient"
    group by age_group

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'Under 18','18-34','35-54','55-74','75+'
)

select julian_day
from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_date"
where julian_day is null

select doctor_id
from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_doctor"
where doctor_id is null

with all_values as (

    select
        sex as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "healthcare_db"."staging"."stg_patients"
    group by sex

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'M','F'
)

select medication_id
from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_medication"
where medication_id is null

select patient_id
from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_patient"
where patient_id is null

select procedure_id
from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_procedure"
where procedure_id is null

select visit_id
from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."fact_hospital_visit"
where visit_id is null

from "healthcare_db"."staging"."stg_addresses"
where address_id is null

from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."fact_prescription"
where prescription_id is null

where city_id is null

select insurance_provider_id

where insurance_provider_id is null

select medication_id
from "healthcare_db"."staging"."stg_medications"

where patient_id is null

select prescription_id

where prescription_id is null

select procedure_id
from "healthcare_db"."staging"."stg_procedures"
where procedure_id is null

select state_id
from "healthcare_db"."staging"."stg_states"
where state_id is null

with child as (
    select admission_date as from_field
    from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."fact_hospital_visit"
    where admission_date is not null
),

parent as (
    select julian_day as to_field
    from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_date"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    julian_day as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "healthcare_db"."analytics"."dim_date"
where julian_day is not null
group by julian_day
having count(*) > 1
